access_prerequisites: Verily Raw Device Data Tier-3 approval

formula_sha_policy.zero_shot_formula_sha256: write after approved schema probe, schema metadata recording, and target-free manifest preflight; validate before extraction or scoring

locked_no_search_rules: no scaffold before approved schema probe
no cache extraction before schema-probe metadata recorded
no PPMI labels for zero-shot feature selection
no PH/MFDFA column search on PPMI
no TopoFractal component-count search on PPMI
no cross-branch adaptive stacking before zero-shot results
no X4 13-sensor V2+V3-GSP transfer on wrist-only PPMI unless approved schema proves comparable multi-node sensors before formula freeze
no endpoint switching after PPMI outcomes
no canonical WearGait-PD T1/T3 update from external-only metrics

manifest_requirements.zero_shot_fold_scope: train on WearGait-PD only; PPMI labels held for final scoring

result_record_requirements.claim_scope: external-validity or route-only sanity evidence only

blueprint.scope: Content-free analysis design for the first eligible PPMI / Verily work after data-owner approval and schema-probe metadata exist.

x4_v2_v3_gsp_2bag.zero_shot_formula_role: excluded from Track A/B for wrist-only PPMI schemas; may only enter a future formula if the approved read-only schema probe proves comparable multi-node anatomical sensors before formula SHA freeze

source_prompt_trace.prompt_rank_requirement: PPMI/Verily topology-first external transport after access approval

no cross-branch adaptive stacking before zero-shot results

No T3 full-cohort candidate beats iter47 by the promotion/MCID gate.
